--- Cult Fanatic --- HP: 33/33 | AC: 13

→ Goliath — Iron Concentration: DEX save [d20:7+7=14 vs DC 11] SUCCESS. No effect.

→ Goliath — Iron Concentration: SUCCESS. 10 damage (half).
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
